description: Decide what to build and why before coding. AI Creative Director + AI Architect + Harness Engineer for evidence-backed project architecture.

defaultPrompt: Use Project Forge to turn this idea into an implementation-ready architecture and harness plan.
Review this project with Project Forge and identify the evidence, verification, and CI gaps.
Help me define a Project Forge evaluation scenario for this agent workflow.
interface.longDescription: Project Forge adds two AI identities to your workflow: a Creative Design Director who turns vague ideas into product direction with competitive analysis and architecture signals, and an AI Architect who picks the right stack backed by GitHub/web evidence. It generates a complete harness contract (install/test/lint/build/run/smoke commands), CI workflows, and a Superpowers implementation handoff.
interface.shortDescription: AI project architect: research-backed stack selection, creative direction, and auto-generated harness contracts.

name: project-forge
